'''Reigalius''' was the [[Reigat]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. It was located in the [[Yucrales sector/Legends|Yucrales Sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] near [[Leritor/Legends|Leritor]].

{{Planet-stub}}
